allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in data: if item.get\('type'\) == 'image_url' or 'screenshot' in str\(item.get\('type',''\)\).lower\(\): print\('IMAGE ITEM:', str\(item\)[:500]\) elif item.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\('TEXT \(first 2000 chars\):', item.get\('text',''\)[:2000]\) print\('---'\) ")
Bash(node -e "try { const bcrypt = require\('bcrypt'\); bcrypt.hash\('Admin@1234', 12\).then\(h => console.log\(h\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('no bcrypt'\); }")
